name: penumbra-glsl-01-cpig-gyroid
description: CPig live preview through the IN-PROCESS GLSL studio (Swath C) â€” the DENSE (voxel-bake) render path. Loads 53_penumbra_preview.json via the Slop loader (unified Field TPMS gyroid âˆ© sphere â†’ CPig Penumbra Preview), sets the preview backend to GLSL (PenumbraPreviewBackend Glsl), then Build â†’ CPig pushes its .3mf which routes to a device-free node compile and renders in the in-process GLSL conduit (native depth, camera-tracked) â€” NOT the out-of-process image-blit overlay. The unified Field TPMS is PROCEDURAL â†’ it voxel-bakes to a 3MF functionfromimage3d image stack; Penumbra decodes that to a dense SDF grid (bug 0054) and renders it via u_sdfGrid. PREVIEW DISCIPLINE: the Slop fixture sets preview:false on all field nodes so ONLY the Penumbra render appears in the viewport (a visible GH field preview clutters/occludes the SDF + masks whether Penumbra rendered). ASSERTS: deterministic panel asserts (SlopSuccess / Connected / Status=Pushed / no FATAL) prove the CPigâ†’Penumbra push + connection regardless of framing. VISUAL: mode:capture â€” saves the candidate for manual review (inspect it + gl.scene.loaded telemetry; no image pass/fail). VLM regression is wired but dormant (setup.vlm = ollama qwen2.5vl:7b + a gyroid-vs-sphere vlmDescription) â€” re-enable by flipping the checkpoint mode back to vlm. DIAGNOSTIC: empty viewport â‡’ the SDF likely rendered unframed/tiny (roadmap A2 auto-fit) or the node host is stale (restart Rhino). Requires: Penumbra.Rhino plug-in auto-loaded + the CPig .gha (Penumbra Preview, GUID â€¦BA200).

setup.vlmDescription: A 3D ray-marched SDF surface drawn into the Rhino viewport: a GYROID lattice â€” an intricate, periodic, maze-like structure of smoothly-curved interconnected walls riddled with holes and passages, clipped to a roughly spherical region. The defining feature is the repeating, porous, interconnected lattice topology with many visible holes. It must NOT be a single smooth featureless sphere, ball, or egg; NOT a solid blob; NOT a flat 2D overlay; NOT an empty grey viewport.
